message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with three objects. Each has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies".

We have three questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis?

Given text: It's just a paragraph. It doesn't list main sections. So compliance: false. Feedback: It doesn't mention sections. Strong part? None.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section.

Same: no. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, not.

Thus all false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Ensure JSON format, each object with keys exactly. "question" value should be "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" as per instruction: "One word: Chapters/Description/Structure depending on which question you are currently answering". So set that.

Let's produce.
